title: scabiosa comosa var. japonica
intro: Scabiosa comosa var. japonica, also known as Japanese pincushion flower, is a type of flowering plant in the honeysuckle family (Caprifoliaceae) native to Japan. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Its health benefits are attributed to its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The herbal preparations of Scabiosa comosa var. japonica often involve drying and processing its flowers and leaves into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
